data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring. However, while the linked use case mentions AI proctoring that flags if a candidate looks away too long, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation of live monitoring or AI proctoring as required. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not fully satisfy the need for validation of this specific requirement.
gaps: No concrete evidence of live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for proctoring methods
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete evidence or API endpoints that validate the implementation of live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring.
